full_text:
Meeting with Anniina 20.09.23

Main aim: Myeloid cell subtypes identification and their functional heterogeneity in 3D

1 or 2 samples for initial 3D analysis (we selected S026 and S107)

Stainings will be started after Inga-Maria will help me with understanding the distance which is required for myeloid phenotype changes in 2D (we will apply the same distance for z-scale for 3D)

Exclude markers for lymphocytes (FOXP3, CD4, CD8, CD45RO, PCNA) and add functional markers for myeloid cells (pSTAT1, ANXA2, TIM3)

Functional markers should go first in cycles and discrete markers (+/-) - later

Prepare questions for 3D CyCiF before 3rd October!

Meeting with Ada and Inga-Maria 25.09.23

We will profile 2 samples (S026: gBRCA1, no progression and S107: BRCAwt, progression PFS 10.49)

We will profile 600 μm of each block

Slides will be 5 μm in thickness

Thus, we will get 120 slides from one block

For 3D we will use each 8th slide - for one block we will use for analysis 15 slides which is OK

Thus, the distance between slides for 3D will be 35 μm

So we will ask to cut the block continuously, but if it is technically impossible for any reason our plan B is to ask to do 3 slides continuously and then skip 20 μm and repeat.

Today I will discuss with Saun blocks (she will send them this week to be cut) and I will order Annexin A2 antibody, cause we do not have it in the lab.

The panel is almost finalised, I just need to discuss the order with Ada.

Some antibodies, in which we are not sure, will be tested together with Adhiti's validation this week.
